items.name: Shark Launcher
items.description: What did you expect it to shoot?  Missiles?

items.name: Flaming Dragon Slayer Bo Staff
items.description: Made from the talons of previously slayed dragons.  How he slayed the first one, I'll never know!

items.name: Zeus's Lightning Bolt Staff
items.description: Hurl lightning at your enemies.  Because they probably deserve it.

items.name: Scythe of Singularity
items.description: This mighty weapon will leave you spinning.  Literally.

items.name: Njay's Web Blaster
items.description: Everyone knows that Njay writes web code like nobody's business, but did you know he also shoots spider webs that stop people from moving and do some serious damage?

items.name: Penguin Potion
items.description: Waddle like a pro!

items.name: Killer Bee Launcher
items.description: Bees?!?  Yes, bees!  Shoot a swarm of killer bees at your foes.  Each shot releases five groups of six bees that will charge at any foes within 25 studs of you.

items.name: Knights of Redcliff: Bow and Arrow
items.description: The Knights of Redcliff are well known for their talented archers.  Their unique Redcliff arrows are thought to be especially deadly and are crafted in complete secrecy by only one Redcliff family, that hands down the secret to each generation.

items.name: Silly Stilts
items.description: You'll earn that scholarship to clown college in no time!

items.name: Sir Scaresalot
items.description: A good knight always carries on until the job is done. Equip to spawn this loyal ghost knight by your side. He'll attack at your command.

items.name: Sand Tempest Scimitar
items.description: In the lost desert kingdoms, three things are eternal: fire, sand, and steel.

items.name: Booster Gloves
items.description: Oh you wanted some jet propelled gloves that let you glide through a level leaving only trails of smoke in your wake?  Yeah we've got those.

items.name: Rocket Sled
items.description: A rocket powered sleigh will take you anywhere you want to go! Use the arrow keys or 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', to control your sleigh.

items.name: Spam Cannon
items.description: Shoot spam at your friends! Includes such classics as - "donate plox" and "post this on ten items and get on free"

items.name: Bloxster PRL
items.description: Where speed meets elegance, the Bloxster is a most sophisticated ride on two wheels.

items.name: Guitarmy
items.description: Blow away your enemies with this heavy sound!  Also - cannonballs.

items.name: Above Top Secret Jetpack
items.description: An essential gadget for every spy.

items.name: Hungry Lion Friend
items.description: He's hungry, but he's also your friend.  So he probably won't eat you.... probably.

items.name: The Tormentor's Axe
items.description: Only the very best escape the hot steel of the Tormentor's Axe!

items.name: Battle Bottle
items.description: This bottle is half full...of explosives.

items.name: Merely's Bluesteel Hoverboard
items.description: Merely is basically the Tony Hawk of hoverboarding.

items.name: Leprechaun Potion
items.description: The leprechaun potion makes you half your normal size and 2x faster!

items.name: Conjuror's Fist
items.description: Instantly crushes anyone and anything unfortunate enough to be below where you’ve summoned it.

items.name: Ice Axe
items.description: Defend the igloos at any price!

items.name: Bo Staff
items.description: Unleash the flaming fury within with this spinning bo staff.  The final blow has an extra firey kick!

items.name: Retribution Ray
items.description: The forces of retribution are always listening. They never sleep.

items.name: DarkAge Ninjas: Dual Kamas
items.description: Fast and Elegant. Strike at the hearts of your enemies or spin like the hurricane destroying anything and everything in your path!

items.name: Telamax XR71 Shoulder Cannon
items.description: The Telemax XR71 Shoulder Cannon is a vital piece in every soldier's arsenal.  Shoot your enemies and revitalize yourself!

items.name: Ogre Friend
items.description: Friend or foe?  You be the judge!

items.name: Megagavel
items.description: You're out of order! You're out of order! Everyone is out of order! Click to send people flying out of your courtroom.
